title: andryala pinnatifida subsp. ducellieri
intro: Andryala pinnatifida subsp. ducellieri is a plant species, also known as the Ducellieri's andryala, within the family Asteraceae, native to the Mediterranean region. It is believed to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to provide several health benefits, including relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and protection against oxidative stress. In traditional herbal medicine, Andryala pinnatifida subsp. ducellieri is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
